name: Creamy Hungarian Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak navy beans overnight.
2. Drain the beans and place them in a large soup pot with chopped onions, leek, carrots, and minced garlic.
3. Add water to an inch above the level of the beans.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then simmer, covered, until tender (about 1 1/2 hours).
5. Mix in the salt, pepper, and paprika.
6. Ladle out 2 cups of hot bean liquid and slowly stir it into the flour until smooth.
7. Add the flour mixture back to the beans, stirring constantly.
8. Remove the soup from heat and whisk in the sour cream and vinegar.
9. Gently reheat the soup for about 10 minutes.
